scope: custom: core_engine + combat — Module 7 (perception / facing / FoV)
note: v32 facing model (combat_v32_proposal §11.2): facing's effect is EMERGENT from perception, replacing v31's authored Facing Ob table. FoV zones (Central/Near/Far/Blind) -> FoV factor scales sight-mediated Reading (Tactile exempt) + gates reaction availability. Emergent facing advantage DERIVED from two compounding channels (Reading scaledown + reaction loss), composing M5.reaction_sigma; reproduces v31 ≈ -1 flank / -2 rear. All Class B §11.2 drafts (FoV factors + angular bands sim-tunable). [ASSUMPTION] emergent magnitude uses unit base Reading δσ; exact value from Phase-4 Reading net-success table (§4.5) wired in M8. [GAP] §4.5 Reading->δσ not modelled in M7 (structure validated; magnitude deferred). Built with depth per Jordan directive (not stubbed).

entries.quoted_text: FoV factor per zone: Central 1.0, Near-peripheral 0.6, Far-peripheral 0.3, Blind (rear) 0.0
FoV zones by relative angular position: Central ±~30°, Near-peripheral ~30-70°, Far-peripheral ~70-110°, Blind >~110°
Reaction availability: Central all reactive; Near-peripheral Hand-led+Body-led only; Far-peripheral Hand-led only (reflexive); Blind none. You cannot void what you cannot see.

entries.value: Effective Reading Pool (channel) = base Reading Pool x FoV_factor; Tactile exempt
entries.quoted_text: Each sight-mediated Reading channel Pool scaled by opponent FoV factor; Tactile (the bind) is contact-mediated, not FoV-scaled
emergent advantage reproduces ≈ -1 effective Ob at flank (v31 authored value emerges from perception model, reframe_blueprint §4)
emergent advantage reproduces ≈ -2 effective Ob at rear; compounds super-linearly (Reading scaledown + reaction loss)
